commands.repair_reason: - [P2] There is a narrow mechanical session-key repair that automation can attempt; maintainer review still owns the bundled-provider decision after the fix.; Needs attention: No secret leak was found, but the media-ingress and external recording-status boundary need maintainer security/operator acceptance before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve Teams caller identity in session keys — extensions/voice-call/src/... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled `msteams` voice-call provider with an authenticated bridge WebSocket, streaming/realtime call paths, Teams chat task delivery, config/schema/docs, SecretRef metadata, and tests.

PR surface: Source +2190, Tests +1610, Docs +139. Total +3939 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows Teams AAD IDs flow into the existing phone-number session-key normalizer, which strips non-digits. No runtime execution was needed to see that identity-loss path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow mechanical session-key repair that automation can attempt; maintainer review still owns the bundled-provider decision after the fix.
